# The Crisis of the European Sciences and Transcendental Phenomenology

*[Husserl](../philosophers/husserl.md) · 1936 · *Die Krisis der europäischen Wissenschaften**

His last great, unfinished work: Husserl diagnoses the forgetting, by Galilean science, of the life-world (Lebenswelt), the concrete ground of all knowledge, and charges this objectivism with the crisis of meaning in European culture.
